subject: [PATCH v5 06/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in non-present PMD walkers

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch updates various non-present PMD walkers in the Linux kernel to handle swap entries correctly, mirroring their PTE-level equivalents. It introduces a new helper function `smaps_account_swap()` and modifies several functions such as `move_soft_dirty_pmd()`, `clear_soft_dirty_pmd()`, and `pagemap_pmd_range_thp()` to account for swap entries alongside migration entries. The patch also fixes issues with MADV_FREE, MADV_COLD, and MADV_PAGEOUT operations on swapped-out THPs, ensuring that swap slots are properly handled and released.
